approved_exception_note: No non-retrieval tooling edits are approved for this handoff; split tooling work into a separate lane.
kickoff_budget_note: Within the default AGENTS.md low-risk budget: 6 completed tasks, retrieval-owned paths only, no shared or integrator-locked edits, and required local gates rerun before handoff.
roadmap_items: Milestone 4: Retrieval Layer -> FTS-first ingestion/index path for context/vault documents
scope_completed: Delivered behavior: vault, collection:, and doc: retrieval requests now route through src/qual/retrieval/service.py into the owned retrieval engine. src/qual/engine/retrieval/__init__.py exposes the canonical retrieval surface, src/qual/engine/retrieval/policy.py keeps fts active while leaving pageindex and embeddings deferred, and section: remains rejected until fallback support exists. This completed scope stays within src/qual/retrieval/** and src/qual/engine/retrieval/** only, with no codex_packet_handoff/tools/* or src/qual/engine/tools/* edits included in this handoff.
scope_goal: Document the retrieval handoff boundary while keeping the lane-owned retrieval scope constrained to FTS-first MVP behavior and excluding out-of-lane tooling edits.
tasks_completed: Re-anchored the packet to the retrieval feature commit and kept the lane-owned file list narrow.
Kept the handoff surface within the lane-owned retrieval paths only.
Added a concrete Scope completed statement for the delivered FTS-first behavior and kept the handoff retrieval-only.
Kept the changed-file list constrained to src/qual/retrieval/** and src/qual/engine/retrieval/**.
Preserved the roadmap and vision mapping while keeping PageIndex and embeddings deferred.
Documented the section-scope compatibility boundary for the current FTS-first MVP path.
compatibility_note: Breaking compatibility note: section: scopes are intentionally rejected in the owned retrieval service until section fallback support exists. Callers that depend on section targeting must switch to vault, collection:, or doc: scopes for the current FTS-first MVP path.
